name: HIGH_EXPRESSION_TARGETS_BY_CANCER
description: High expression targets by cancer. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (t:Target)-[:DIFFERENTIAL_AND_HIGHLY_EXPRESSED_IN]->(c:Cancer {name: $cancer})
RETURN DISTINCT t.symbol AS target
ORDER BY target
LIMIT 50

examples: Which targets are highly expressed in KIRP?
Which targets are highly expressed in MESO?
Which targets are highly expressed in OV?
